changes: Reduced SKILL.md from ~297 lines to ~45 lines for devstral-small's limited context
Added explicit instruction to use write tool instead of printing code in chat
Added concrete mutex pattern using promise chaining for race condition fixes (boolean flag approach doesn't work in async JS)
Added specific off-by-one binary search fix pattern

Removed all supporting files (root-cause-tracing.md, defense-in-depth.md, condition-based-waiting.md, condition-based-waiting-example.ts, find-polluter.sh, test-*.md, CREATION-LOG.md) as they added noise for a small model
